resources.string: Tap to check for a newer version
Freezes all your clones at once and stops their background processes; toggle off to unfreeze — no data loss
Rebuilds the work profile connection; clones will close during the process
Create a new Android work profile for cloned apps
Permanently removes the dual space and all clone data inside it
Exports a detailed 2 MB rolling log and current system snapshot
For feedback and discussion, search WeChat for “%1$s”.
No extra authorization needed; core cloning, launch, freeze and file transfer all work
Enhances cloning and cross-user operations; requires a Shizuku service connection
Advanced repair and diagnostics; requires Root permission
Shizuku lets PrismSpace use ADB privileges to enhance cloning and cross-user operations.
Step 1 Install and open the Shizuku app.
Step 2 Pair via Wireless debugging, or connect a computer and run ADB to start Shizuku; if you have Root you can start it from within Shizuku with one tap.
Step 3 Return to this page and tap the button below to check and authorize the connection.

A dual-space manager for Android. Built on top of the system work profile, it provides isolated runtime environments so the same app can run with multiple accounts in parallel, with data fully separated.
